---
title: "Day 11: Puglia - Tour Day 1"
subtitle: "Tour Being Planned"
date: "2026-06-15"
day-of-week: "Sunday"
location: "Puglia"
categories: [itinerary, puglia, placeholder]
status: "Placeholder - Tour Details TBD"
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Placeholder Page - Tour Being Finalized

This day is part of our 6-day Puglia organized tour (June 14-19). Specific itinerary, accommodations, and activities will be updated once tour operator and schedule are confirmed.

**Expected Update:** Late March/early April 2026
:::

---

## Overview

**First day of Puglia tour** exploring Italy's hidden gem - the heel of the boot.

**Tour Duration:** 6 days (June 14-19)
**Tour Status:** Being planned and finalized

---

## Expected Activities (Based on Typical Puglia Tours)

**Possible Destinations:**
- **Alberobello** - UNESCO trulli houses
- **Lecce** - "Florence of the South" with baroque architecture
- **Polignano a Mare** - Dramatic coastal town
- **Ostuni** - The White City on a hilltop

**Typical Day Structure:**
- Morning departure from accommodation
- Guided tour of historic site or town
- Lunch (included or recommended restaurant)
- Afternoon activity or free time
- Evening return to accommodation
- Dinner (included or independent)

---

## General Puglia Information

**See:** [Puglia Overview](../regions/puglia.qmd) for comprehensive region information

**What Makes Puglia Special:**
- Unique trulli architecture (cone-shaped stone houses)
- Baroque masterpieces in golden limestone
- Adriatic coastal beauty
- Authentic southern Italian culture
- Exceptional food and wine (orecchiette pasta, burrata, Primitivo wine)
- Far fewer tourists than Tuscany

**Climate in June:**
- High 80s°F (28-30°C)
- Sunny and dry
- Coastal breezes
- Perfect for exploration

---

## What to Pack for Tour

**Essentials:**
- [ ] Comfortable walking shoes (cobblestones, hills)
- [ ] Sun protection (hat, sunglasses, sunscreen)
- [ ] Light layers (churches may require shoulders covered)
- [ ] Camera
- [ ] Water bottle
- [ ] Small daypack
- [ ] Cash for incidentals

**Tour Will Likely Include:**
- Transportation between sites
- Professional guide
- Some meals
- Entrance fees to attractions

---

## When This Page Will Be Updated

Once Puglia tour is confirmed, this page will include:
- [ ] Exact daily itinerary
- [ ] Departure time and meeting point
- [ ] Specific destinations for the day
- [ ] Accommodation details (hotel name, location, check-in)
- [ ] Meals included vs. independent
- [ ] Free time vs. guided activities
- [ ] What to bring specifically for today

---

## Resources

**General Puglia Information:**
- [Puglia Overview](../regions/puglia.qmd)
- [Puglia Tourism Official](https://www.viaggiareinpuglia.it/en)

**Tour Research:**
- [Tours Research Page](../research/tours.qmd#puglia-regional-tour)

---

## Temporary Notes

**Use this space to add notes when tour is booked:**

**Tour Operator:**

**Accommodation Tonight:**

**Activities Today:**

**Highlights:**

---

**Previous:** [Day 10: Naples to Brindisi](day-10-2026-06-14-naples-to-brindisi.qmd) | **Next:** [Day 12: Puglia Day 2](day-12-2026-06-16-puglia.qmd)
